Class MeasurementBusiness

java.lang.Object
lcr.business.MeasurementBusiness
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable
public class MeasurementBusiness extends Object implements Runnable
Background worker thread responsible for continuously polling measurement data from the LCR meter, performing metric conversions, and executing periodic hardware configuration syncs. * @author sylkat

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    MeasurementBusiness(MeterBusiness meterBusiness, ConfigBusiness configBusiness, Object serialLock)
    Constructs the measurement controller loop instance.

    Method
    Description
    void
    addObserver(MeasurementObserver observer)
    Registers a notification observer to listen for real-time measurements and UI updates.
    String
    detectPrimaryAutoUnit(double value)
    Infers base unit tags during automatic detection routines depending on measurement threshold steps.
    String

    Resolves the primary unit symbol according to the parameter type context.
    String
    getManualUnitSecondary(Object param)
    Resolves the secondary unit symbol according to the parameter type context.
    void
    pauseSync(long durationMs)
    Requests a temporary delay pause blocking configurations sweeps during specific operational windows.
    void
    run()
    Core polling engine loop that processes telemetry reads, tracks connection stability, and triggers automatic settings synchronizations.
    void
    startMeasurementTimer()
    Spawns and initiates the background LCR hardware reader thread pool lifecycle.
    void
    stopMeasurementTimer()
    Signals the background loop worker to stop execution and attempts an immediate thread interrupt.

  • Constructor Details

    • MeasurementBusiness

      public MeasurementBusiness(MeterBusiness meterBusiness, ConfigBusiness configBusiness, Object serialLock)
      Constructs the measurement controller loop instance. * @param meterBusiness the core meter abstraction controller
      Parameters:
      configBusiness - the core configuration business coordinator
      serialLock - the shared synchronization mutex for safe multi-threaded serial interface usage

  • Method Details

    • addObserver

      public void addObserver(MeasurementObserver observer)
      Registers a notification observer to listen for real-time measurements and UI updates. * @param observer the measurement observer implementation

    • startMeasurementTimer

      public void startMeasurementTimer()
      Spawns and initiates the background LCR hardware reader thread pool lifecycle.

    • stopMeasurementTimer

      public void stopMeasurementTimer()
      Signals the background loop worker to stop execution and attempts an immediate thread interrupt.

    • run

      public void run()
      Core polling engine loop that processes telemetry reads, tracks connection stability, and triggers automatic settings synchronizations.
      Specified by:
      run in interface Runnable

    • getManualUnit

      public String getManualUnit(Object param)
      Resolves the primary unit symbol according to the parameter type context. * @param param the target PrimaryParameter enum object
      Returns:
      the metric unit string (F, H, or Ω)

    • getManualUnitSecondary

      public String getManualUnitSecondary(Object param)
      Resolves the secondary unit symbol according to the parameter type context. * @param param the target SecondaryParameter enum object
      Returns:
      the metric unit string (deg, Ω, or empty string)

    • detectPrimaryAutoUnit

      public String detectPrimaryAutoUnit(double value)
      Infers base unit tags during automatic detection routines depending on measurement threshold steps. * @param value the raw real-world numeric reading float level
      Returns:
      a best-guess base unit identifier string (F or Ω)

    • pauseSync

      public void pauseSync(long durationMs)
      Requests a temporary delay pause blocking configurations sweeps during specific operational windows. * @param durationMs total sleep timeline limit expressed in milliseconds
